creator: antop@netscape.net
text:
Gimp1 port failed to compline. Here's an edited transcript:

Script started on Mon Oct 12 09:18:26 1998
DevNoc#	make
===>  Extracting for gimp-1.0.1

Fix: 

Adding '-L../../libgimp/.libs' before '-lgimp' in the last 'cc'
line seems to work, but that line is generated by libtool and I don't know
how to fix it to emit the proper command.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
	su
	cd /usr/ports/graphics/gimp1
	make
